metadata.title: Lily — Never lose a plant again
metadata.description: Track every plant, never miss a care day. Lily helps you manage your plant collection with care reminders, AI diagnosis, and more.
metadata.ogTitle: Lily — Never lose a plant again
metadata.ogDescription: Smart reminders, AI diagnosis, and care schedules personalized to every plant in your home.

Hero.subheadline: The average plant lover kills 7 plants before giving up. Lily makes sure that never happens to you — with smart reminders, AI diagnosis, and care schedules personalized to every plant in your home.

WhatIsLily.heading: What is Lily?
WhatIsLily.text: Lily is a plant care app for iOS and Android that helps you keep every plant alive and thriving. It combines a personal plant collection tracker, AI-powered plant identification from photos, personalised care reminders for watering, fertilising, and misting, and an AI chat that diagnoses problems using your plant's specific care history. Over 10,000 plants are tracked by Lily users, and the app holds a 4.8-star rating on the App Store. It's free to try for 7 days — no credit card required — then $4.99/month or $29.99/year with all features included.

Features.heading: Everything your plants need
Features.subheading: From identification to daily care, Lily has every tool to keep your green space thriving.
Features.item0Catchline: All your green friends, in one place
Features.item0Description: Manage your full plant collection with individual profiles — photos, species info, health status, and personalised care schedules for each plant. Whether you have 3 plants or 300, everything stays organised.
Features.item1Catchline: The right care, at the right time
Features.item1Description: Lily sends push notifications when each plant needs watering, fertilising, or misting — based on its species, location, and your local conditions. No more guessing or forgetting.
Features.item2Description: Log watering, fertilising, repotting, pruning, or any custom care action in seconds. Every action is timestamped and stored, building a complete care history you can review anytime.
Features.item3Description: Lily's plant identification uses your phone camera to recognise over 10,000 plant species instantly. Take a photo and get the species name, common name, and a complete care profile.
Features.item4Description: Chat with an AI that has full context on your specific plant — its age, care history, environment, and health. Get diagnosis for yellowing leaves, brown tips, pests, or any issue with personalised advice.
Features.item5Catchline: Grow your skills, not just your plants
Features.item5Description: Earn badges and unlock milestones as you build consistent care habits. Track your streaks, celebrate your plant collection growing, and level up as a plant parent.
Features.item6Catchline: Share your garden with the world
Features.item6Description: Create a public plant profile, follow other plant lovers, and showcase your collection to the community. See what others are growing and get inspired by their setups.
Features.item7Description: Group plants by room — living room, bedroom, balcony — to see how each environment affects growth. Track light conditions and adjust care schedules per location.

Testimonials.heading: Loved by plant people
Testimonials.subheading: Real reviews from the App Store.
Testimonials.quote0: I used to forget to water my plants for weeks at a time. Since using Lily, I haven't lost a single one. The reminders are perfectly timed and it feels like having a plant expert in my pocket.
Testimonials.quote1: The AI diagnosis feature is genuinely impressive. It identified root rot on my monstera before it was obvious to me and gave me a step-by-step recovery plan. Plant saved!
Testimonials.quote2: I've tried every plant app out there. Lily is the only one that actually sticks because the care schedules adapt to each plant individually. My whole collection is thriving.

FAQ.heading: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subheading: Everything you need to know before you start.
FAQ.q0: Is there really no credit card required?
FAQ.a0: Yes, completely. You download the app, start your 7-day free trial, and you're never asked for payment details upfront. You only enter payment info if you choose to subscribe after the trial.
FAQ.q1: What happens when the 7-day trial ends?
FAQ.a1: You'll receive a reminder 3 days before the trial ends. If you choose not to subscribe, your account stays active in read-only mode — you can still view your plant collection and history, you just won't receive new reminders or use the AI features.
FAQ.q2: How is Lily different from Planta or Greg?
FAQ.a2: Lily combines personalized care scheduling, AI plant diagnosis, and social features in one app — without the bloated subscription tiers. Every feature is available from day one, and care schedules are tailored to your specific plant's location and conditions, not just the species defaults.
FAQ.a3: Yes. You manage your subscription directly through App Store or Google Play settings. There are no cancellation fees and you keep access until the end of your billing period.
FAQ.q4: Does Lily work on iPhone and Android?
FAQ.a4: Yes. Lily is available on both iOS (iPhone and iPad) and Android. Your data syncs automatically across all your devices.
FAQ.q5: How accurate is the AI plant diagnosis?
FAQ.a5: The AI is trained on thousands of plant diseases, pests, and care issues. It also has context on your specific plant — its age, care history, and environment — which makes its advice significantly more accurate than generic tools. For rare conditions, it will always recommend consulting a specialist.

Pricing.heading: Simple, honest pricing.
Pricing.trust0: No credit card required to start
Pricing.trust1: Reminder sent 3 days before trial ends
Pricing.trust2: Cancel from App Store / Play Store settings, anytime
Pricing.trust3: Your plant data is yours, forever

Footer.tagline: Track every plant, never miss a care day.

About.heading: About Lily
About.metaDescription: Meet the small, passionate team behind Lily. We built the plant care app we wished existed — so you never lose a plant again.
About.introText: Lily is a plant care app built by plant lovers, for plant lovers. We help you track every plant in your home with smart reminders, AI-powered diagnosis, and personalised care schedules — so no plant gets forgotten.
About.storyText1: Lily was born from a simple frustration: too many plants dying from forgotten care. We had tried every trick — sticky notes on the fridge, phone alarms, even spreadsheets — and still watched perfectly healthy plants wilt because life got in the way.
About.storyText2: So we built the app we wished existed. A small, passionate team of plant lovers who believe technology should make caring for living things easier, not harder. Lily started as a side project in a tiny apartment full of overwatered ferns and underwatered succulents. It grew from there.
About.missionText1: We believe every plant deserves attentive care, and every plant parent deserves a little help. Plants improve our spaces, clean our air, and calm our minds — but only if they survive long enough.
About.missionText2: Our mission is simple: make plant care effortless. Whether you have one cactus on a windowsill or a jungle filling every room, Lily adapts to your collection and keeps you on track. No guilt, no guesswork, just healthier plants.
About.ctaHeading: Ready to keep your plants thriving?
About.ctaText: Download Lily and start your free 7-day trial. No credit card required.

Privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Lily ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal data when you use the Lily mobile application (the "App") and our website at withlily.app. We are committed to protecting your privacy and complying with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), and other applicable data protection laws.
Privacy.s1Text: The data controller responsible for your personal data is Lily. For any questions regarding data processing, you can reach our data protection team at privacy@withlily.app.
Privacy.s2Text: We collect the following categories of personal data:
Privacy.s2Cat1Items: Name and email address (during account creation)|Plant collection data (plant names, species, photos, locations, care logs)|Subscription and payment status (managed by Apple App Store or Google Play — we do not store credit card details)|Support requests and feedback you send us
Privacy.s2Cat2Items: Device information (device model, operating system, app version)|Usage data (features used, session duration, interactions)|IP address and approximate location (country/region level, for language and timezone defaults)|Crash reports and performance data
Privacy.s2Cat3Items: Authentication data if you sign in with Apple or Google|App Store or Google Play subscription status
Privacy.s3Text: Under GDPR Article 6, we process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
Privacy.s3Items: Contract performance: To provide the Lily app services you requested, including care reminders, plant tracking, and AI diagnosis (Art. 6(1)(b))|Legitimate interest: To improve our app, fix bugs, analyze usage patterns, and prevent fraud, where these interests do not override your rights (Art. 6(1)(f))|Consent: For optional features such as push notifications, marketing emails, and AI-powered plant photo analysis. You can withdraw consent at any time (Art. 6(1)(a))|Legal obligation: To comply with tax, accounting, or regulatory requirements (Art. 6(1)(c))
Privacy.s4Text: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
Privacy.s4Items: Providing and maintaining the App, including personalized care reminders and schedules|Processing plant photos through AI models for species identification and disease diagnosis|Sending push notifications for watering, fertilizing, and other care tasks (with your consent)|Analyzing aggregated, anonymized usage data to improve features and user experience|Responding to your support requests and feedback|Processing subscriptions and managing your account|Detecting and preventing fraud or misuse of the service
Privacy.s4Text2: We never sell your personal data to third parties. We do not use your data for automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects.
Privacy.s5Text: We share your data only with the following categories of service providers, each bound by data processing agreements:
Privacy.s5Items: Cloud hosting: Our servers are hosted on Railway (infrastructure provider), which processes data on our behalf in data centers located in the United States|Analytics: We use Google Analytics (Google LLC) to collect anonymized usage statistics. Google Analytics uses cookies and may transfer data to the US under Standard Contractual Clauses. You can opt out at any time via the app settings|AI services: Plant photos submitted for identification or diagnosis are processed by third-party AI models. Photos are transmitted securely, used only for the requested analysis, and not retained by the AI provider beyond processing|Push notifications: We use Expo (Expo Inc.) to deliver push notifications to your device|Payment processing: Subscriptions are handled entirely by Apple App Store or Google Play. We receive only your subscription status, not your payment details
Privacy.s5Text2: We may also disclose your data if required by law, court order, or to protect our legal rights.
Privacy.s6Text: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy:
Privacy.s6Items: Account data (name, email): Retained while your account is active, and deleted within 30 days of account deletion|Plant data (collection, care logs, photos): Retained while your account is active. Exported to you upon request before deletion|AI diagnosis photos: Processed in real-time and not stored on our servers after analysis is complete|Usage analytics: Aggregated and anonymized data is retained for up to 26 months (Google Analytics default)|Support correspondence: Retained for up to 2 years after resolution|Payment records: Retained as required by applicable tax and accounting laws (typically 5-7 years)
Privacy.s7Text: Your data is stored on secure servers with industry-standard protections, including:
Privacy.s7Items: Encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest (AES-256)|Access controls and authentication for all internal systems|Regular security reviews and dependency updates|Automated backups with encryption
Privacy.s7Text2: While we implement robust security measures, no system is completely secure. We encourage you to use a strong, unique password for your Lily account.
Privacy.s8Text: Your data may be transferred to and processed in the United States, where our infrastructure is hosted. For transfers of personal data from the European Economic Area (EEA), the United Kingdom, or Switzerland to the US, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission, or other valid transfer mechanisms as required by applicable law. You can request a copy of the applicable SCCs by contacting us at privacy@withlily.app.
Privacy.s9Text: Our website (withlily.app) uses the following tracking technologies:
Privacy.s9Items: Google Analytics: Collects anonymized page views, session duration, and referral sources. Uses first-party cookies with a 2-year expiration. You can opt out using browser extensions or cookie settings|Essential cookies: Used for language preference (locale) and theme selection. These are strictly necessary and do not require consent
Privacy.s9Text2: The Lily mobile app does not use cookies. In-app analytics are collected via our own infrastructure and Google Analytics with anonymized identifiers.
Privacy.s10Text: Under GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
Privacy.s10Items: Right of access (Art. 15): Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you|Right to rectification (Art. 16): Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data|Right to erasure (Art. 17): Request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten")|Right to restriction (Art. 18): Request that we limit how we process your data|Right to data portability (Art. 20): Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format (JSON export)|Right to object (Art. 21): Object to processing based on legitimate interest, including analytics|Right to withdraw consent (Art. 7): Withdraw consent for optional processing (e.g., push notifications, marketing) at any time without affecting prior processing
Privacy.s10Text2: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@withlily.app. We will respond within 30 days. If you are unsatisfied with our response, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority. For users in France, this is the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés) at cnil.fr.
Privacy.s11Text: Lily is not directed at children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 16. If you believe we have collected data from a child under 16, please contact us at privacy@withlily.app and we will promptly delete the data.
Privacy.s12Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors. When we make material changes, we will notify you through the App or by email at least 30 days before the changes take effect. Your continued use of Lily after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
Privacy.contactText: For any privacy-related questions, data requests, or concerns, contact our data protection team at
Privacy.contactAddress: You can also write to us at: Lily, privacy@withlily.app.
Privacy.metaDescription: Learn how Lily collects, uses, and protects your personal data. GDPR-compliant privacy policy covering your rights, data retention, cookies, and third-party sharing.

Terms.heading: Terms of Service
Terms.s1Text: By downloading or using Lily, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the app.
Terms.s2Text: Lily is provided for personal, non-commercial use. You may not use the app to distribute malware, infringe intellectual property rights, or engage in unlawful activities.
Terms.s3Text: Lily offers a 7-day free trial with no credit card required. After the trial, continued use of premium features requires a paid subscription managed through Apple App Store or Google Play. You may cancel at any time; access continues until the end of the billing period.
Terms.s4Text: Lily's AI plant diagnosis is provided for informational purposes only. Always consult a professional horticulturist for critical plant health issues. We are not liable for plant losses resulting from following in-app advice.
Terms.s5Text: For questions about these terms, reach us at
Terms.metaDescription: Read the Terms of Service for Lily, the plant care app. Understand your rights and our policies.

Support.heading: Support
Support.intro: Need help with Lily? You're in the right place. Below you'll find answers to common questions and ways to reach our team directly.
Support.contactText: For any question, bug report, or feedback, email our support team at
Support.contactResponseTime: We typically respond within 1 business day (Monday–Friday, Paris time).
Support.faqs: How do I start my free trial?::Lily offers a 7-day free trial with no credit card required. Download the app from the App Store or Google Play, create an account, and your trial starts automatically.|How do I manage or cancel my subscription?::Subscriptions are managed through your App Store or Google Play account. On iOS, open Settings → [your name] → Subscriptions → Lily. On Android, open Google Play → Profile → Payments & subscriptions → Subscriptions. Cancelling stops future renewals; you keep access until the end of the current billing period.|How do I request a refund?::Refunds are handled by Apple and Google, not by Lily. For App Store refunds, visit reportaproblem.apple.com. For Google Play refunds, go to play.google.com/store/account and locate the order.|How do I delete my account and data?::You can delete your account directly from the app: Settings → Account → Delete Account. This permanently erases your plants, care logs, photos, and personal data within 30 days. You can also email privacy@withlily.app to request deletion.|How do I export my plant data?::Email privacy@withlily.app from the address linked to your account. We'll send you a JSON export of your plants, care logs, and account data within 30 days, as required by GDPR.|Why didn't I receive a care reminder?::Check that notifications are enabled: iOS Settings → Lily → Notifications, or Android Settings → Apps → Lily → Notifications. Inside Lily, go to Settings → Notifications to confirm reminders are switched on. If problems persist, email us.|Is my plant photo data private?::Yes. Photos submitted for AI identification or diagnosis are processed in real time and are not retained after analysis. See our Privacy Policy for full details.|How accurate is the AI plant diagnosis?::Lily's AI is a helpful starting point but not a substitute for expert advice. For critical plant-health issues, consult a professional horticulturist.
Support.accountText: For GDPR/CCPA requests — access, correction, deletion, or data portability — contact our data protection team at
Support.metaDescription: Get help with Lily. Contact support, find answers to common questions about subscriptions, account deletion, data export, and plant care features.
